description.value:
Receive Prescription processing script3 building blocks for patient H. XXX_Kerkhoff
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_kwalificatie_afhandelen_voorschrift_ontvangen
Original description: KWAL script 3 Kwalificatie script 3: afhandelen medicatievoorschrift met zo nodig medicatie.
Receive Prescription processing script3 resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '704369') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '72214') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '119431') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '373784005').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '704369') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '72214') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '119431') ))).where((quantity.value = 1)).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '704369|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (NITROLINGUAL OROMUCOSALE SPRAY 0,4MG/DO FLAC 250DO)
